scriptItem.label: Open MorfyAI
scriptItem.scriptCode: import os, sys # Both the release and the dev copy ship a top-level launcher.py, and both # roots sit on PYTHONPATH -- so a bare `import launcher` can bind to the dev # copy and open THAT instead. Force this release's own root to the front and # drop any stale `launcher` before importing, so we always load ours. _r = os.environ.get('MORFYAI') if not _r: try: import hou _r = hou.getenv('MORFYAI') except Exception: _r = None if _r and os.path.isdir(_r): if _r in sys.path: sys.path.remove(_r) sys.path.insert(0, _r) sys.modules.pop('launcher', None) import launcher launcher.show_tool()
